summary:
END TIMES ACCELERATION AND PROPHETIC VISIONS: Brandon shares prophecies regarding a rapid acceleration in global economics, politics, and spiritual phenomena, signaling the imminent return of Jesus Christ. Brandon references visions from various religious figures, including Sister Billye, Tracy Harris, Steve Cioccolanti, and John Kilpatrick, who foresee severe upcoming trials such as major storms, the appearance of a pale green warhorse, and a plague surpassing the severity of COVID. Brandon details a personal spiritual vision of a massive, dark purple storm approaching the East Coast of the United States. In this vision, a giant wall of protection separates the darkness from a place of divine light and provision, which Brandon compares to the biblical separation of Goshen and Egypt.

PRACTICAL PREPARATION AND OVERCOMING FEAR: Brandon recounts a past experience surviving a severe, two-week ice storm in the Ozarks and Oklahoma alongside individuals named Shelly, Terry, and Lynn at Prayer Mountain. Drawing from this event, Brandon advises listeners to maintain practical emergency supplies, such as extra gasoline, water, and non-perishable canned foods like tuna and peanut butter. However, Brandon strongly warns against extreme survivalism and actions driven by fear, criticizing panic-driven behavior seen during the Y2K scare near Lake Michigan and Chicago. Brandon emphasizes that relying solely on stockpiled goods is insufficient and that true protection comes from faith rather than fear-based hoarding.

SPIRITUAL AUTHORITY AND CHURCH PURITY: Brandon asserts that the most crucial survival skill for the impending times is a profound, internal revelation of the power and authority of the name of Jesus. Brandon warns that churches failing to embrace the Full Gospel will face complete devastation, while a pure, remnant church will rise and attract true seekers from all directions. Brandon stresses the necessity of internalizing biblical scriptures, specifically mentioning Psalm 91, Psalm 23, Romans, Ephesians, Hebrews, James, and the words of Jesus. Brandon uses the metaphor of a cow chewing its cud to illustrate how individuals must continuously consume and meditate on scripture until it becomes a living rhema word inside them.

DIVINE AMBASSADORSHIP AND DAILY FELLOWSHIP: Brandon explains that believers are spiritual ambassadors on earth, fully backed by the power and resources of heaven, enabling them to heal the sick, cast out demons, and face earthly institutions like banks, doctors, or the IRS without intimidation. Brandon highlights the importance of maintaining a close, daily relationship with God, comparing it to the constant nurturing required in a marriage. Brandon encourages listeners to bypass relying strictly on prophetic voices and instead hear directly from God through daily prayer, fasting, and reading the Bible. Brandon also notes the importance of everyday evangelism, using visits to stores like Target as opportunities to reach out to lost souls.

INTERCESSION AND DECLARATIONS OF HEALING: Brandon conducts a time of spiritual intercession, claiming deliverance and freedom from curses based on Galatians 3:13. Brandon makes specific declarations for the return of wayward children, commanding angels to draw unsaved loved ones back to faith and breaking spirits of confusion over their minds. Additionally, Brandon pronounces physical healings over listeners' bodies, specifically mentioning the restoration of kidneys, livers, and thyroids, and asserts that believers should hold no fear of death, pestilence, or natural disasters because of their divine protection.
rawData: [November 10, 2023]-[Storms coming - how to prepare]-[https://youtu.be/jsTDpjVtYV0]-[Family, I'm excited to be with you all today. First off, I just want to say thank you for all of the likes, for clicking the notification bell, and for subscribing. It is helping to get the gospel out. There are so many emails that I get telling me, 'Hey, I got born again today watching your video,' or 'Hey, I got baptized in the Holy Ghost today watching your video.' I've heard from people who were set free from addictions—people who were addicted to cigarettes and all kinds of perversions who email me and say they got set free. So I just want to let you know, thank you for all of your support. You know, there are a lot of people saying, 'Well, you're the only one seeing anything; you're the only one having these visions, and nothing's come to pass.' I just started this YouTube channel back in March, and the Lord told me there’s going to be an acceleration of all things: acceleration of the economy, acceleration in politics, and acceleration in spiritual things, like the signs in the heavens. We are going to see some amazing things in the days ahead. No man knows the day or the hour when Jesus Christ is coming, but I can tell you I have an urgency in my spirit that He's coming. I have an urgency in my spirit to tell you it's time to repent, to get on our knees, and to seek the Lord with all our hearts. We are in the last of the last seconds before the coming of the Lord Jesus Christ, and I want to encourage you today: don't give up on your dreams, don't give up on what God's called you to do. We've got to push. We're right at that one-yard line, right before first and goal, and we're about to make a touchdown. As the body of Christ, we've got to stand and be even stronger now than we've ever been before because great days are ahead for the body of Christ. I want to give you that encouragement before I tell you about the storms. There are a lot of people talking about the storms. I've seen people on Sid Roth, and there are other prophetic people who have seen stuff, but I was looking at people like Sister Billye. I told you all that I was caught up in the Spirit while I was praying one night, and I went before the throne. There was prayer circling in the throne—I'll put the video in the description below if you're new to my channel—but there was a pastor that I saw whom I wasn't really familiar with. I looked him up afterward and have kept an eye on him to see what's going on in his ministry. Whenever I was in the Spirit, the Lord showed me this pastor, Tracy Harris, and he has a church in Texarkana. The Lord told me to follow his ministry regarding the end times. Then you go back to what Pastor Steve Cioccolanti said; he talked about the pale, green-colored horse—the warhorse—and then the plague would come after. Well, like I said, we prophesy in part and hear in part. I see these things coming and I don't really know the dates, but I feel an urgency in my spirit. The Lord will show you things way in advance. This prophecy from Sister Billye that you're going to hear is about a storm and the economy—something happening—and then the next one we'll hear is about a plague coming greater than COVID. Pastor John Kilpatrick had a visitation from the Lord in the midnight hour warning him about a storm coming. Many men of God are hearing about a storm coming, and the Lord's warning them like little fire alarm bells going off: 'Caution, caution, caution. Red alert.' There's a storm coming, but there'll be a calm after. There are going to be judgments. You can sense things. We're not talking about the Great Tribulation—you will not even be here—but here in the Ozarks, Shelly and I remember the ice storm years ago that knocked out electricity for two weeks. Trees broke everywhere. I remember it happened here in Oklahoma thirteen years ago. I had sold my house and was living in a double-wide with Shelly at Prayer Mountain until I could find another house. Terry and Lynn lived up over the firehouse. We had no heat, but we had a fireplace and lots of wood, so we made a fire. We had iron cookware and made oatmeal, boiled water, and made chili. Terry would come down on the snowmobile and help us out; he's a survivor. For a while, they had a generator. It was two weeks of below-zero weather every night. If you lived around here and moved to town, town didn't have much better, though they had some fuel. Anyway, praise the Lord. I say pretend you're in the Ozarks and there could be an ice storm. It probably wouldn't last too long, maybe a few days, so it wouldn't hurt to keep your car filled with gas, have a couple of extra cans, and have plenty of water and food. I'm not a scare tactic person; I don't want you in fear. But it doesn't hurt to have some peanut butter, tuna fish, salmon, and things in cans that you don't have to fix for two or three days. I just think it wouldn't be a bad idea. Besides, if nothing ever happens, you can eat it and drink the water! Glory be to God. You're not going to throw any stones or tomatoes when things happen according to God's calendar. She's telling everybody, not in fear, to have a Psalm 91 level of extra in your house. You can have an urgency like I'm talking about. When I was in the Spirit, the Lord showed me a massive storm coming on the East Coast. It was dark, dark purple all inside, and every once in a while, the Lord shows it getting closer and closer. The last time I saw it, it was on our shores. He showed me a massive, thick, humongous wall of protection. He said this wall was separating the storm from protection. There were dark clouds on one side and great light on the other. He said this is just like when it was dark in Egypt and it was light in Goshen. He was telling me, 'This is Psalm.' There was a table prepared with dishes, bread, and all kinds of beautiful stuff for us as believers. There was a stream of quiet brook right next to the table, green lush grass all around it, and a little cottage with smoke coming out of the chimney from baking fresh bread. The Lord told me, 'Brandon, I have prepared a table before you in the presence of all your enemies.' He said in the days ahead, you will have to have a revelation of the name, the power, and the authority of the name of Jesus. You're going to have to know that you need to get Psalm 91 and Psalm 23 deep down in your heart. Put it so deep down inside of you that you don't question it. It's like it's a rhema word to you; that is what I'm talking about. You can read the word, but you have to know the word. You have to have a revelation knowledge of the word. You can just go through Genesis and read it and read it and read it, but the devil knows when you know. I'm telling you, I've seen it; I know in the spirit realm when that sword comes out of your mouth and it cuts the devil. It's either alive inside of you or it's not. You can quote it and quote it and quote it—and faith cometh by hearing, and hearing by the word of God. That's how you get rhema word inside of you: by hearing and hearing and hearing and hearing it again. Not just hearing it once, but whenever you eat it like a cow eating its cud. It sits there, and it spits up out of its stomach and it chews on that grass again. You've got to keep that word inside of your mouth, and it's what brings life. That's whenever your mountain needs to hear your voice. You have to speak to your circumstances, and that's what I'm talking about: having the authority of the believer and having a revelation of the name of Jesus, understanding who we are in Christ, seated with Him in the heavenlies, far above all principalities and powers and might. It's not going to come just by hearing it once; it's not just going to come by hearing it twice. Faith comes by hearing, and hearing, and hearing by the word of God, getting that revelation inside of you of where we are in these end times. The Lord told me, 'Sobering days are coming. Very sobering days, very hard days for some people.' But He said, 'What's the opposite of sober?' And I said, 'Drunk.' He said, 'Be being filled with the Holy Ghost, a fresh touch from the Holy Ghost every single day, dying to self daily, getting in that river with Him and sitting at His feet on a daily basis and reading that word.' Just like I'm talking about, being that cow eating that grass over and over again until it becomes rhema word inside of your spirit. I'm telling you, it's like a light switch coming on, and that's whenever you speak that word out of your mouth and the devil—James: Submit yourself unto God, resist the devil, and he will flee from you. I'm going to go to 'The Midnight Hour,' this next prophetic word. This is the man that I saw in the throne room with the Lord praying for the nations, asking the Lord for a fresh visitation from Him concerning souls and outpouring. I heard his prayers, and that's what he was praying for in 'The Midnight Hour.' This is a warning. What's amazing about this: the Lord had this visitation the same night I had the visitation going to the throne. Then he comes back and he tells what he saw. Suddenly, as I'm lying there praying in the throne room, I'm just overwhelmed with what He's saying to me about what we have and the authority of faith in that name—what we're going to do. It wasn't but a matter of minutes and He said this: 'There are things coming on the earth that, without revelation of the power and the authority in the name of Jesus, My people will not survive.' I'm trying to tell y'all—can you see why I had to build your faith before I started talking to you? You can't get caught up in the things I'm going to say, because if you're natural-minded, you're going to worry. 'What is it? What's the Lord saying? What's coming on the earth?' That's not the point. The point is to stay on point, and if you'll do what I'm telling you to do, you'll survive no matter what's coming in the earth. So stay on point. I don't want to say this, but I'm bound to; in the office He gave me, I really don't want to say this because it's His church. But I have nothing else I can say about His church but what the Head of the church is telling me. I'm believing God this won't be, but I saw it and it comes up in me again. He said, 'While you're under this anointing, say it.' You're about to see in the shift: churches right now that are absolutely going and blowing, and you think, 'Oh, wow, they're doing great.' In a short time, if they will not take hold of the Full Gospel and operate in the authority of this name, they're literally going to look like somebody drove a truck through there. I mean, it's going to be cleaned out like somebody sucked them out of there—the victims: some to the curse, some dead, some in the hospital. Others will say, 'I'm not getting what I need here,' and they're going to race to the glory. They're going to rise out of darkness and come to the light. They do not have anything in their arsenal to deal with what I saw coming. The prodigal are coming home, and the weak, anemic, selfish Christians that want the church to pat them on the back are about to get an awakening, startled and sprinkled by the power of God. You mark my words: the remnant church is going to become the place to be, and they are coming from the north, the south, the east, and the west. They're going to jump in the river, and the river is going to carry you right to the perfect... Purity is going to be at a premium. It's going to be hard to find, but it won't be hard to recognize when you find it—the real from the fake. It'll be kind of rare, so it'll be hard to find, but it won't be hard to recognize it when you do find it. Glory be to God! I don't want this to happen. I don't want whole churches to be decimated, but they're going to be steamrolled by this thing if they don't rise up and understand who they are in Christ. Because churches are the bullseye of the target. God is raising up a nation within a nation and raising up some voices, young and old, that are going to run together. And He said this word: 'Purity will be at a premium in the last days.' This will become the most important survival skill for the body of Christ. Not canned foods and dried foods or water or anything else; this will become the most important—exclamation point—the revelation of the power and the authority of the name of Jesus. Exactly! When God is saying 'prepare,' He's not talking about buying your $177,777 'good luck' dried food package where your family can eat for five years in a cave. If He speaks to you, you're going to know it. He can tell you how long it lasts, when it's coming, where it's coming from, and you'll have time to go do it. I'm not against savings accounts or having food put back or water or buying at a discount or buying in bulk. I'm not against any of that; what I'm against is the fear that's causing you to do it and the trust in it. Because I can guarantee you: if you've got three weeks of water, then what, big boy? Is that all you're going to live, three weeks past the provisions? Come on, now. This will be the most important survival skill, bar none, in the end times: the revelation of the power and the authority of the mighty name that's above every name, where we can handle life, that will bring fish, water, and bread in the desert where there's no river. God can fly bread to Elijah on ravens; He is not going to have a problem getting your stuff to you. I don't care what kind of pandemic is going on; we're not going to run out of trees. So you're going to have heat? Go cut some trees and have a fire. It amazed me at Y2K, the people that just went crazy. I was ministering around Chicago, and people were just acting a fool. I said, 'Y'all are scared of running out of water? You've got Lake Michigan right there!' But people go nuts; fear will make you stupid. I'm telling you right now: the authority of that name—glory to God—the authority of that name! Yes, I said glory to God, the authority of that name, the authority of the name! We're going to launch into it; we're going for it, glory to God! Right here, you're about to see revelation of the name of Jesus explode all over the world because, if it doesn't, the Holy Ghost can't come finish this harvest. There's going to be a massive harvest. I won't be the only one preaching it, but He told me that, as a matter of fact, I would be one of the tips of the spear, so I'm getting after it, sir. I'm about to get after it because, by and large, my generation has little to no revelation of it, and what revelation they did learn thirty years ago, they lost. They're not operating in it, but there is glory in that name, there's power in that name, and I'm named with that name. Whatever that name can do, I can do. Anything that name can do, I can do. I've been given the name, and whatever the name can do, I can do because it's my name. I'll never be intimidated in front of a sick person as long as I'm putting my hands on them in that name. I'll never be intimidated in front of a demon-possessed person as long as I know when the devil manifests, I've got that name to use. There'll be no banker's statement, no doctor's report, no lawyer's plea or suit, no government transaction, no threatening letter from the IRS. There'll never be anything that we have to draw back from or be intimidated by as long as we know we've got that name. I tell you, I'm totally convinced of this. This is so strong. Can you understand? We just went through a portal; we literally just went through a shift. We just stepped somewhere today. This is the ninth month of the year; this thing's coming to pass for us. So, here we are. We have power and authority. He's warning about what He saw coming, and it's like He said: 'Stay on point.' We have to focus on what the Lord has told us, that we have power and authority to tread on serpents and scorpions and nothing shall by any means hurt us. We have to understand that we have the authority of the name of Jesus back in us, just like we are ambassadors of the Lord Jesus Christ on this earth. As we take our place—like I was trying to tell you all before—an ambassador of America has all of America backing him: the Treasury Department, the military, everything. Here we are as believers; we go in the name of Jesus and we're ambassadors of the Lord Jesus Christ, ambassadors of heaven in this earth. We are seated with Him in the heavenlies, and so we're coming down here and we're operating in that name. It's what's backing us. It's like the name of America is backing the ambassador for whoever is going in that name. So we're coming in the name of Jesus; we're coming in the name of heaven. We're going as ambassadors into the earth, and we have all heaven backing us. So what I'm trying to say to you is we have nothing to fear. We have nothing to worry about because Jesus Christ dwells on the inside of us and all heaven is backing us. We have all the angels, the military, we have all of the Treasury Department, cattle on a thousand hills. Everything of the Lord's is His, and the fullness thereof. It's all the Lord's; everything we need is in that name. If we go before Him, take communion daily, and seek His face, we have the medical team; we can lay hands on the sick and they'll recover, we can cast out devils, and we can raise the dead. We can do it all in that name. So I just want to encourage you all today that we know that these storms are coming. We know that it says in the last days that wars and rumors of wars, we'll see plagues and pestilence and things coming. We know that all that stuff's coming, but we have authority. As He is, so are we in this world, and we are able to do what He did. Greater works will you do than what He did. Greater works! What more could we do? Well, you know, we lay hands on the sick, we cast out devils freely. Freely we've been given, freely we give it out. And so I'm just trying to encourage you all today to get in your Bibles. I want you to put the prophetic ministry out of business because you have the ability to hear the Lord for yourself. You don't need prophetic people to tell you what's coming. You can hear God for yourself. You can get in the word, you can fast, you can pray. And yeah, He speaks to His prophetic voices—I believe that for these end times—but there's a lot of people that are desperate. They email me: 'What can I do to invest? Where should I be moving? Where should I be living? Where should I be going with my kids and my family?' We're desperate; we don't hear the Lord. Well, I'm going to tell you the Bible says that a sheep knows His voice and a stranger's voice we will not follow. I believe with all my heart the Spirit of the Lord dwells on the inside of you, and you don't need a man telling you what to do. We're not fortune tellers; we hear what the Lord is saying to us to tell you about what's coming. But I'm telling you the same Spirit of God that dwells on the inside of me and talks to me on a daily basis, He'll talk to you. And I'm telling you if you read His word and you pray and you seek His face every day and you spend time with Him, it's just like a relationship with your wife. If you only talk to her once a week, you're not going to have a good relationship. If you only talk to her twice a week, you're only going to have a semi-okay relationship. But the more you spend time with her, the more you have fellowship with her, and you sit on the couch at night and you have fellowship—you hold her and you tell her, 'Baby, I love you,' and you go out on dates and you go out to dinner—and you fellowship with that bride you're married to, it builds a relationship. Over the course of twenty-three years of marriage, the relationship that I have with my wife today is nothing compared to when we first got married. A year into it, you think, 'Oh, I really know this person,' but I didn't know her at all back then. Here we are twenty-three years in, and I find something new about her every day. How bad do you want a relationship? How hungry and how much of a desire do you have for a relationship with the Lord? I'm trying to compare it to a marriage, and it is like that. But I'm trying to tell you all: how hungry, how desperate, how bad do you want a relationship with Jesus? It's when you spend time with Him daily and sit at His feet. I seek Him and I say, 'Jesus, I need your fresh touch today. I'm dry. I need a fresh touch of the Holy Ghost today. I need a drink. I'm so thirsty, Lord. I'm so desperate for more of you. You are the potter, I'm the clay. I need you today, Lord.' And even whenever you're having a hard day, you run to Him. You don't run from Him; you run to Him. When you sin, you don't run from Him; you run to Him. When we mess up and we sin, your sin is none of the devil's business. He tempted you; he causes us to stumble and fall. The Bible says that he's the great tempter and the accuser of the brethren. But I'm telling you when you run to the blood and you run to the name of Jesus and you say, 'Father, I need you. I'm desperate. I've messed up.' He's able. He said if you confess your sins, He is faithful and just to forgive you of your sins and cleanse you of all your unrighteousness. I'm telling you that God is a faithful God and He loves you today. If you seek Him and if you abide in Him and His words abide in you, you shall ask what you will and it shall be done. I'm telling you, it’s you abiding in Him and His words abiding in you. Get that word down inside of your heart. If you abide in Me and My words abide in you, you shall ask what you will and it shall be done. I’m telling you, it’s getting that word down inside of you—you abiding in His word and He abiding in you—because it is said the Word is the Lord. He is the Word; God is the Word. And I’m telling you, God is light and in Him there is no darkness at all. I’m telling you, God is love. God is light, but God is the Word, and He breathed on that Bible. When you’re reading that Bible, you’re reading the Lord, and it’s coming into you, breathing life into you. It gives you strength to your flesh, and I’m telling you, it renews your mind and your thinking. It anoints you and appoints you for such a time as this. I’m telling you, it’s the Word of God that will set you free. You’ve got to get that word on the inside of you, because if you don’t, the Bible says the enemy comes like a roaring lion seeking whom he may devour. And the ones he’s able to devour are the ones that don’t know the Word and don’t have a revelation of the Word. Because I know the Bible says this: submit yourself therefore unto God and resist the devil, and he will flee from you in terror. He’s going to run from you and be scared of you. But it’s the Word that you know on the inside of you in these last days that’s going to get you free. You shall know the truth, and the truth will set you free. It’s the truth of God’s Word, the truth of understanding who He is and what He has done for you. If you just were to read Ephesians, Hebrews, and James, and just meditate on that word—meditate on Romans, meditate on that Bible over and over. Read everything that's in red that Jesus said; read it over and over again. And I’m telling you, it is life to those that find them and health to all their flesh. The Bible says that My words are life to those that find them and health to all their flesh. Praise God! His word is a lamp unto my feet and a light unto my path. I will hide His word in my heart that I might not sin against You. I think about all the scriptures and all the things that He’s given us to give us power and authority over the devil. So, I’m just trying to encourage you all, trying to tell you that Jesus loves you so much. He has a plan for your life, and it’s a good plan, a Godly plan, a strong plan. Beloved, I wish above all things that you prosper and be in health, even as your soul prospers. He wants you to be prosperous in what you do; He wants you to be successful. He has a plan for your life, and I try to tell you all this because I live it. I’m telling you I’ve lived it and I still stand on it. I live by faith every day of my life. I seek Him and I believe with all my heart that He will impart His fire on your life to touch the nations for Him, to lay hands on the sick and see them recover. People don’t want to hear about Target; they don’t want to hear about going in there. They get mad at me in the comment section: 'Well, why you go to Target?' Because there are fish! I want to go in there and touch the souls for Jesus. There are people that are desperate, and what a better place to go where there are all these people that desperately just need Jesus? They’re lost, and I’m telling you, I go where the lost people are. I want to be a light. Help me to shine so bright today, Father. Help me, God, to be the representation of You. Create in me a clean heart, Lord. Help me, Father. Anoint my words that when I speak, I’m not speaking from me; I’m speaking for You. Father, these people are desperate for a touch of the Holy Ghost, a fresh fire of Your presence on their life, a manifestation of Your glory on their marriages. We call, Father, because they’re so dry; they’re not getting fed a good word at church. They’re so desperate; they’re running to and fro, like a chicken with its head cut off. They don’t know where to turn. They don’t hear Your voice, Lord, but I know that Your word says they shall hear My voice and a stranger’s voice they won’t follow. Concerning the end times, I plead the blood of Jesus Christ over every single person that is represented on this YouTube broadcast right now that is listening to me. I cover them in the blood. I thank You, Father, that they are my friends and my helpers; they’re here spreading the good news. I intercede for them that their wayward children are coming home. Their children are coming home. They will know You again, Lord. You said train up a child in the way they should go, and when they get older, they will not depart. Train them up in the Word. Father, I thank You, there's people in here who may not have known the Word, but Father, we call wayward children home. We call them home in the name of Jesus. We call angels out there right now to go from the north, the south, the east, and the west, calling all those unsaved loved ones to come in right now in the name of Jesus. We call you in; you will not burn in hell. We call our unsaved loved ones home in Jesus' name. We call the blood of Jesus Christ to cover them, Father. I thank You, Lord, that it drives off that demonic spirit that’s latched onto their head, causing the spirit of confusion. We take authority over it right now in the name of Jesus. We plead the blood over their minds. In Ephesians, Father, the eyes of their understanding would be enlightened. Father, I thank You, Lord, that the revelation would come to them even in their sleep, that Jesus died for them and He rose again, and He is willing to save them from all of their sins and deliver them. Father, I thank You, Lord, that You are touching the hearts of men. We thank You for the greatest harvest of souls in these last days that we’ve ever seen on this planet before—the greatest harvest of healings and deliverances. We call people healed and whole and well in the name of Jesus. We thank You, Lord, that You said in Your word, Father, that by Your stripes we are healed, we are delivered, and we are set free by the power of the blood. We’re not bound by the devil anymore, for Galatians 3:13 says Christ has redeemed us from the curse of the law. You don't have to be under the curse anymore. Jesus paid the price for you to walk in victory in every area of your life. You don't have to be bound, you don't have to be poor, you don't have to be broke, busted, and disgusted anymore. Jesus paid the price for you. Jesus loves you so much and He wants you to be free. Father, I thank You, Lord, that freedom is coming to these people today. No matter what storm, no matter what earthquake, no matter what pestilence. To be absent from the body is to be present with You. Death has lost its victory over us; death is no longer lorded over us. We don't have fear over death because when we die, we go to be with Him. So we're not going to be afraid of pestilence, of plagues, of terror attacks, or earthquakes. Fear has lost its victory over me. Perfect love casteth out all fear, for fear has torment, and he that feareth is not made perfect in love. So we've got to be made perfect in His love today. My Father loves me, my Father delivers me, my Father cares for me. If He cares for the lilies of the field, if He cares for the sparrows—He knows when a sparrow falls—He knows whenever I have needs; He knows when you have needs. Nothing's too big for God. He is El Elyon, the Most High. He is Jehovah Jireh. He is 'I Am that I Am.' And the same Jesus that dwelt 2,000 years ago. Jesus Christ: the same yesterday, today, and forever.
